---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.content-wrap .container-narrow}
## Contact Information

**Yuchi Liu**  
Postdoctoral Researcher  
Tsinghua University  
Email: [liuyuchi@zju.edu.cn](mailto:liuyuchi@zju.edu.cn)

## External Profile

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=zh-CN&user=frOLfcIAAAAJ)

## Note

I welcome academic exchanges and potential collaborations related to composite materials, durability, structural mechanics, and computational modeling.
:::
